title: GRC Finding
description: Canonical output contract for claude-grc-engineering connectors. One document per resource-evaluation batch. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for the pipeline model.

schema_version.description: Semver of this schema. Consumers pin a major version.

source.description: Stable identifier of the connector that produced this document.

source_version.description: Version of the connector tool, for reproducibility.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this collection run. ULID or UUID recommended.

type.description: Resource type, prefixed by provider. Use snake_case.

arn.description: AWS ARN or equivalent canonical identifier if applicable.

uri.description: Non-AWS canonical URI (e.g., gcp self-link, okta URL, github html_url).

region.description: Region or location. Null for global resources.

account_id.description: AWS account ID, GCP project ID, Okta org, GitHub org, etc.

evaluations.description: One or more control evaluations performed against this resource. At least one is required.

raw_attributes.description: Optional: the tool's native attributes for this resource. Preserved as-is for audit trail. Consumers SHOULD treat as opaque.

findings.description: Optional: high-level narrative findings that may span multiple controls.

metadata.description: Optional connector-specific context (config used, scan scope, rate limits observed, etc.).

evaluation.description: One control evaluation. A single resource may have many evaluations (e.g., an IAM user evaluated against AC-2, AC-6, IA-2, IA-5).

control_framework.description: Framework identifier. Prefer SCF for portable indexing; others are acceptable and are mapped via crosswalk.

control_id.description: Framework-native control identifier (e.g., SCF 'GOV-01', NIST 'AC-2', SOC2 'CC6.1').

status.description: pass: requirement met. fail: requirement not met. not_applicable: scoped out. inconclusive: tool could not determine (missing permission, API error). skipped: intentionally skipped by user config.

severity.description: Independent of status. A failed low-severity control is not a passed one. Use 'info' for passing/NA evaluations.

message.description: Human-readable detail. Required for status=fail or status=inconclusive.

ref.description: Reference to a remediation artifact: generated Terraform, scan-iac auto-fix, or external runbook URL.

evidence_refs.description: Pointers to raw artifacts backing this evaluation. Path relative to the cache dir, or a URL.

assessed_at.description: Optional per-evaluation timestamp if different from collected_at.

narrative_finding.description: High-level finding that may span multiple controls or resources.
